text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... I need... to train more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Checking in with Mejiro McQueen, I see that she is pushing herself
especially hard today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I cannot afford to let myself disgrace the Mejiro name any further.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: "Do I find it hard to channel strength into my legs?" I don't think so!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears to be incredibly flustered by something, and it is
certainly affecting her running ability.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's this? My entire body is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her body wobbles a bit before crumbling to the ground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an examination at the Academy infirmary, it appears she is
suffering from a mild case of anemia.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The root cause appears to be a lack of nutritional intake. Is she
actually eating properly?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen! I heard you collapsed! Are you all—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um, hello. I'm Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Are you McQueen's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I see... but you still went out of your way to help her, right? Thank
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Do you know why she ended up collapsing out there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell Mejiro Ryan everything I heard from the infirmary staff.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Anemia caused by a lack of nutrients... I see.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I thought something was off leading up to her tryout race. I really
should've spoken to her...
choice_data_list: Sounds like you were keeping an eye on her.
Sounds like you were keeping an eye on her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah. But I wasn't able to do anything for her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You've probably figured it out already, but I'm also a member of the
Mejiro family. We're not siblings, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: McQueen and I grew up on the estate together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's always taken her future objectives real seriously; to the point
where I think she pushes herself way too hard sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wish she'd realize she's perfect just the way she is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, shoot! I need to go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sorry for barging in. Please excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And, um... please take care of McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Entrusting me with her family, Mejiro Ryan hurries off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shortly after, Mejiro McQueen wakes up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So that's what happened... Losing consciousness in the middle of
training...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm very sorry for causing you so much trouble, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm feeling right as rain now! I should get back to traini—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gurgle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
O-of course I am! A Mejiro always has her day planned out perfectly,
and that includes the consumption of three nutritious meals!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Though with the tryouts, I may have decreased the amount I ate
during those meals...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My collapse had nothing to do with my eating habits! I simply haven't
been training hard enough!
choice_data_list: Can you show me your dietary plan?
Can you show me your dietary plan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What? Um, I suppose that's fine...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: McQueen passes over her dietary notes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she is indeed following this plan, then she's only getting the bare
minimum in required nutrition. This could be why she's having strength
issues.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well? As I said, this should be plenty good enough.
choice_data_list: I think it may be a bit too restrictive.
I think it may be a bit too restrictive.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? Really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I shouldn't feel the need to hide anything from you, given
how much you've been looking out for me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Very well. The truth of the matter is that I have a good reason for
following this plan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It's just that... You see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I have a tendency to gain weight easily.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It can even happen just by following a normal dietary plan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't possibly allow anyone to see a flabby Mejiro belly at the
tryouts!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: So that's why I thought it best to limit myself...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: But in the end, I had my priorities backwards.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It seems I have some reflection to do. I apologize again for all the
trouble I've caused you today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With those words, Mejiro McQueen makes her way to the doors of the
infirmary.
